original: Protected from his aroma by your gear, you’re only forced to endure the brash display of his dick and balls.
The harsh, biting winds of the Uvetan tundra are quick to deliver its scent to you, the manly, pungent aroma tickling your brain.
You manage to ignore both the brazen display and his musk, letting the breeze carry it away.
You lose focus entirely for a second, eyeing up his fat, throbbing dickmeat and inhaling as deeply as you can.
If you try hard enough, you think you can catch the slightest whiff of him through the filter.
The scent should be fleeting, pushed away by the roaring gale, but it sinks into your head.

You find yourself salivating as you watch his member throb in his strong, teasing paw, and he smiles toothily at you. “Give up and Vark let you touch.” You suddenly snap out of it, remembering where you are, and shake your head to clear it. A soft heat is coursing through your skin, leaving you hornier than you were before...
You manage to sidestep him and he rolls back onto his feet, clearly much angrier than before.
He connects, his claws like miniature daggers as they glide across the surface of your "+({var0}?"[pc.armor]":"[pc.skinFurScalesNoun]")

original: Your wounds are still open and bleeding.
Fortunately for you, you manage to roll out of his flight path, leaving him to slam into a cave wall behind you. He’s quick to clamber to his feet and snarl at you as he rubs his head.
You don’t manage to get out of the way nearly fast enough, and he slams into you like a dreadnought, pushing the air out of your lungs with enough force to nearly collapse them.

nuts and cock roll against your mask. Your suit prevents the smell from reaching you, and you headbutt him in the jewels, causing him to roll off of you with a howl of anguish. He reorients himself surprisingly quickly, snatching up his loincloth and baring his fangs.

offensive, pungent scent explodes across your senses. Your eyes begin watering and your lungs tingle, trying to hold your breath. You don’t manage for long, the subtly spicy tinge he leaves in the air making you squirm and eventually gasp, gulping thick lungfuls through your mouth and nose, your limbs twitching as you take a direct hit of pure man musk.

His fist slams into you like an avalanche, a sickening crack echoing in your chest. You can’t help but lose hold of your [pc.meleeWeapon] in the shock of the impact, sending it spiraling onto the stone a few feet away.
You deftly weave away from the strike, shoving him backwards and escaping his reach. Probably not a great idea to get close to him.
Vark stumbles for a moment, but regains his composure, shaking off his impairment and roaring in defiance. His eyes lock on you, his jaw setting. He’s not going to let that one slide.
Claws scrabbling, [varmintpet.combatName] slips away from the attack.
The armor plates soak up the damage inflicted by the attack.

There’s still a wild, feral New Texan varmint sitting on your ship. You get glimpses of it from time to time, stalking between rooms on your ship. Still, so long as you leave your food unsecured, it doesn’t seem keen on bothering you
. After the first uncomfortable encounter, it hasn’t even left a mess anywhere.
sitting happily in your quarters, swishing its tail and watching you as you wander about. Whenever you get close, its spikes flare up and it makes a high-pitched, trilling hoot at you.
roaming freely around your quarters. It spots you as it wanders, happily hooting and trilling when you get near.
Who’s a good little cutie-wooty? You are! Oh, yes you are!

The blonde cyborg in front of you is tall, her muscular form shrouded by a black tunic cut from some synthetic fabric interwoven with graphene. A matching pair of shorts, a utility belt and a worn pair of boots make up the rest of her livery. Her prosthetic arm is rock steady as she grips her flechetter, belaying the casual, almost nonchalant, expression plastered across her face as her piercing grey eyes survey you.

Velika snaps her forearm upward to engage your attack, checking the blow.
With practice ease, Velika raises her flechetter and squeezes off two rounds.

original: Venus is not a combat mob. Thus this should never be shown.

You ask Vi if you can sell her some medical supplies. She nods happily, grabbing a digipad with her prehensile tail and dropping it into her hands.\n\n“Of course! We’re always looking for more medical supplies around here. What do you have?”

You ask what items she has to sell.\n\n“JoyCo has provided the latest and greatest in affordable medical technology for the adventurer in need. You won’t find treatments this good for this price anywhere else!” V-Ko efficiently rattles off the full list of her wares, their effects, and their prices without pause.

You ask if you can sell her anything.\n\n“My owners have programmed me to purchase medical-type items and treatments at near galactic bazaar rates.” V-Ko seems rather pleased about admitting that her purchase prices are substandard.
“Excellent. So, what is it you have for me Steele?”
Zaalt casually sidesteps out of the way.

Zaalt is a towering milodan male, a heavily furred feline with a coat of orange and black stripes. His hair falls loosely around his shoulders, half black and half dyed blue. He’s a big man in more ways than just height: barrel chested and broad-shouldered, built more like a boxer than a spacer to your eye. He’s dressed in a dark jacket and weather-worn clothes beneath, now straining against his hammering chest and rippling muscle... and an uncontrollable fire in his loins that demands attention, bulging against his breeches. Claws adorn his fingers, though they seem a small threat compared to his saber-like fangs

“No idea!” you answer back, pushing back the feral cat-man as best you can. Anno just shrugs and takes her place at your side to defend you -- and her home!

Anno is next to you, her compact holdout held out in front of her as she waits for an opportunity to fire. Her bushy tail is tucked in tight, ears lowered against her head, and body poised and ready to avoid incoming attacks.
Anno quickly jumps to the side and evades the attack.
